productDisplayName: Allen Solly Men Leather Brown Wallet
description: Style Noteallen solly was formed in 1744 in Nottingham, England. Their wallets are creatively engineered to cater to the urban male. Make a style statement effortlessly with this simply silhouetted leather wallet. With lots of space for all your monetary essentials and classy stitch detailing, this wallet in brown makes a fabulous combination of style and practicality.Product DetailsHas two main compartmentsEight credit card slots and one slip pocketOne flap with two slip pockets, one see through id card slot and one coin pocket with a press buttoned closureBrand name appliquéd on the frontMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSize11 cm x 9.5 cm
